prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年黑龙江省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约192名→237名→486名→518名→1102名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近两年后移幅度明显加大，2025年基准位次约1102名；该校在黑龙江省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年5人、2022年5人、2023年9人、2024年11人、2025年13人；2026年招生计划为13人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学医学院隶属于上海交通大学（985、211、双一流），软科中国大学主榜上海交通大学2026年排名第4位，属全国顶尖高校层次，医学学科实力突出，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端相关舆情（撤稿事件等），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度评价为较热（上海交通大学整体排名第42位），短视频平台曝光度较高，综合判断声誉影响偏中性略负面；临床医学（A+）、口腔医学（A+）、生物学（A+）、护理学（A-）等学科均为全国顶尖水平，与该校招生专业（临床医学八年制本博连读、口腔方向、儿科学等）高度匹配，学科实力对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业社会热度持续较高，临床医学、口腔医学等长期为热门报考方向；黑龙江省2025年物理类考生约117407人，2026年总考生167000人，按近年物理类占比约68%估算，2026年物理类考生约113560人，较2025年略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解；上海交通大学医学院位于上海市，在黑龙江省招生占比约2.65%（2025年13/490），属跨省招生，无本地生源倾斜；该校在全国招生覆盖面广，黑龙江省考生需与全国考生竞争，地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近两年加速后移）、2026年招生计划持平、考生总数略有减少及声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准1102名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约1132名，区间996–1268名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读,口腔方向）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读,法语班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 暂无合适专业（该校在黑龙江省招生专业较少，临床医学类均属一档，儿科方向属三档）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 儿科学（卓越班）（5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海交通大学医学院在黑龙江省招生专业极少（仅3个），且均为医学类顶尖专业。位次在预测区间（996–1268名）内，建议以临床医学八年制本博连读为主攻方向（一档），儿科学（5+3一体化）作为保底选择（三档）。由于该校位次极高（全省前1000名左右），考生需具备极强的理科竞争力。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics category) in Heilongjiang Province were approximately 192 → 237 → 486 → 518 → 1102, showing a continuous backward trend with significant acceleration in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1102. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province's science (physics category) was: 5 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 13 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan is 13, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (985, 211, Double First-Class). In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks 4th, placing it among the top national universities with outstanding medical disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring students. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct-related public opinion (retraction incidents, etc.), which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. The Douyin heat evaluation is relatively hot (Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks 42nd overall), with high exposure on short video platforms. Overall, the reputation impact is assessed as slightly negative to neutral. Disciplines such as Clinical Medicine (A+), Stomatology (A+), Biology (A+), and Nursing (A-) are all at the national top level, highly matching the university's enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine 8-year MD program, Stomatology direction, Pediatrics, etc.), and the disciplinary strength continues to attract candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to have high social popularity, with Clinical Medicine and Stomatology being long-term popular application directions. In 2025, Heilongjiang Province had approximately 117,407 physics category candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates is 167,000. Estimating about 68% as physics category candidates based on recent years, the 2026 physics category candidates are about 113,560, a slight decrease from 2025, leading to a minor easing of competition pressure. Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai, with an enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province of about 2.65% (13/490 in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local student preference. The university has a broad national enrollment coverage, and candidates from Heilongjiang need to compete with candidates nationwide, with regional preference factors not being significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (accelerated in the last two years), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in total candidates, and a slightly negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 1102. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1132, with a range of 996–1268.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year MD Program)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year MD Program, Stomatology Direction)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year MD Program, French Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- No suitable majors currently (the university has few enrollment majors in Heilongjiang Province; Clinical Medicine categories are all Tier 1, and Pediatrics direction is Tier 3).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Pediatrics (Excellence Class) (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine has very few enrollment majors in Heilongjiang Province (only 3), all of which are top-tier medical majors. For rankings within the predicted range (996–1268), it is recommended to focus on Clinical Medicine 8-year MD Program (Tier 1) as the main target, with Pediatrics (5+3 Integrated Program) as a backup choice (Tier 3). Due to the university's extremely high ranking (around the top 1000 in the province), candidates need strong competitiveness in science subjects.
